allow: Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS storecontrol CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci;")
Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root storecontrol -e "SELECT DISTINCT categoria FROM productos;")
Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root storecontrol -e "SELECT * FROM categorias; DESCRIBE productos;")
